member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.AppointmentsController.GetAppointments
member.summary: Retrieves all scheduled appointments in the hospital system.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches a complete list of all appointments, regardless of their status.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.AppointmentsController.GetAppointment(System.Int16)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific appointment by its unique identifier.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches the detailed record of a single appointment using its auto-generated database ID.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.AppointmentsController.GetAppointmentsByPatient(System.String)
member.summary: Get all appointments for a specific patient
member.remarks: Retrieves a list of all appointments scheduled for a specific patient.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.AppointmentsController.GetAppointmentsByDoctor(System.String)
member.summary: Get all appointments for a specific doctor
member.remarks: Retrieves a list of all appointments assigned to a specific doctor.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.AppointmentsController.PostAppointment(DBApplication.DTOs.AppointmentDto)
member.summary: Schedules a new medical appointment.
member.remarks: Creates a new appointment record linking a patient to a doctor at a specific date and time.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.AppointmentsController.PutAppointment(System.Int16,DBApplication.DTOs.AppointmentDto)
member.summary: Updates the details of an existing appointment.
member.remarks: Modifies properties of a specific appointment.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.AppointmentsController.DeleteAppointment(System.Int16)
member.summary: Cancels and deletes an appointment record.
member.remarks: Permanently removes the specified appointment from the hospital database.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DepartmentsController.GetDepartments
member.summary: Retrieves all hospital departments.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches a complete list of all clinical and administrative departments in the facility.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DepartmentsController.GetDepartment(System.Int16)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific department by its unique identifier.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches the detailed record of a single department using its auto-generated database ID.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DepartmentsController.PostDepartment(DBApplication.DTOs.DepartmentDto)
member.summary: Creates a new hospital department.
member.remarks: Adds a new department to the system.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DepartmentsController.PutDepartment(System.Int16,DBApplication.DTOs.DepartmentDto)
member.summary: Updates the details of an existing department.
member.remarks: Modifies properties of a specific department.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DepartmentsController.UpdateDepartmentManager(System.Int16,System.String)
member.summary: Update department manager
member.remarks: Assigns a new doctor as the manager for a specific department.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DepartmentsController.DeleteDepartment(System.Int16)
member.summary: Deletes a department record.
member.remarks: Permanently removes the specified department from the hospital database.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetDoctors
member.summary: Retrieves all registered doctors.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches a complete list of all medical professionals currently employed at the hospital.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetDoctor(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific doctor by their National ID or specific identifier.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches the detailed record of a single doctor using their explicit string identifier.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetDoctorsByDepartment(System.Int16)
member.summary: Get all doctors in a specific department
member.remarks: Retrieves a list of all doctors assigned to a given department ID.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DoctorsController.PostDoctor(DBApplication.DTOs.DoctorDto)
member.summary: Registers a new doctor in the system.
member.remarks: Adds a new doctor to the database using their explicit ID.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DoctorsController.PutDoctor(System.String,DBApplication.DTOs.DoctorDto)
member.summary: Updates the details of an existing doctor.
member.remarks: Modifies properties of a specific doctor.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.DoctorsController.DeleteDoctor(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a doctor record.
member.remarks: Permanently removes the specified doctor from the hospital database.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.MedicationsController.GetMedications
member.summary: Retrieves all available medications.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches a complete catalog of all medications managed by the hospital pharmacy.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.MedicationsController.GetMedication(System.Int16)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific medication by its unique code.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches the detailed record of a single medication using its auto-generated database ID.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.MedicationsController.PostMedication(DBApplication.DTOs.MedicationDto)
member.summary: Adds a new medication to the pharmacy catalog.
member.remarks: Creates a new medication record.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.MedicationsController.PutMedication(System.Int16,DBApplication.DTOs.MedicationDto)
member.summary: Updates the details of an existing medication.
member.remarks: Modifies properties of a specific medication.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.MedicationsController.DeleteMedication(System.Int16)
member.summary: Removes a medication from the catalog.
member.remarks: Permanently deletes the specified medication from the hospital database.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientPhonesController.GetPatientPhones
member.summary: Retrieves all patient phone numbers.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches a complete list of all contact numbers associated with patients in the system.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientPhonesController.GetPhonesByPatientId(System.String)
member.summary: Get all phones for a specific patient
member.remarks: Retrieves a list of all contact numbers registered to a single patient ID.
member.summary: Get all phones for a specific patient
member.remarks: Retrieves a list of all contact numbers registered to a single patient ID.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientPhonesController.GetPatientPhone(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific phone record for a patient.
member.remarks: This endpoint uses a composite key to fetch a specific phone number linked to a specific patient.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientPhonesController.PutPatientPhone(System.String,System.String,DBApplication.DTOs.PatientPhoneDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing patient phone record.
member.remarks: Since both fields are primary keys, this allows updating by deleting the old and creating the new.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientPhonesController.DeletePatientPhone(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a specific phone number record from a patient.
member.remarks: Permanently removes the specified contact number linked to the patient.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientsController.GetPatients
member.summary: Retrieves all registered patients.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches a complete list of all patient demographics.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientsController.GetPatient(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific patient by their National ID.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches the detailed record of a single patient.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientsController.PostPatient(DBApplication.DTOs.PatientDto)
member.summary: Registers a new patient in the system.
member.remarks: Adds a new patient to the database using their explicitly provided ID.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientsController.PutPatient(System.String,DBApplication.DTOs.PatientDto)
member.summary: Updates the details of an existing patient.
member.remarks: Modifies properties of a specific patient.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PatientsController.DeletePatient(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a patient record.
member.remarks: Permanently removes the specified patient from the hospital database.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PrescribtionsController.GetPrescribtions
member.summary: Retrieves all medical prescriptions.
member.remarks: This endpoint fetches a complete list of all medications prescribed by doctors.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PrescribtionsController.GetPrescribtion(System.String,System.Int16,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific prescription record.
member.remarks: This endpoint uses a composite key to fetch a specific prescription.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PrescribtionsController.GetPrescribtionsByPatientId(System.String)
member.summary: Get all prescriptions for a specific patient
member.remarks: Retrieves the complete prescription history for a single patient.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PrescribtionsController.PostPrescribtion(DBApplication.DTOs.PrescribtionDto)
member.summary: Creates a new prescription record.
member.remarks: Documents a doctor prescribing a specific medication to a specific patient.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PrescribtionsController.PutPrescribtion(System.String,System.Int16,System.String,DBApplication.DTOs.PrescribtionDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing prescription record.
member.remarks: Modifies properties of a specific prescription.

member.name: M:DBApplication.Controllers.PrescribtionsController.DeletePrescribtion(System.String,System.Int16,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a specific prescription record.
member.remarks: Permanently removes the specified prescription link from the database.
